name: Hand-Holding Genie
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>て</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>をつなぐ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Monsters your opponent controls cannot target monsters for attacks, except this one. Gains DEF equal to the combined original DEF of all other face-up Defense Position monsters you control.

eff: Monsters your opponent controls cannot target monsters for attacks, except this one. Gains DEF equal to the combined original DEF of all other face-up Defense Position monsters you control.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
